name: Night at the Zoo
description: At the beginning, you get a job as a night guard at Clifford Tibbets's 'family' zoo. Before you, there was another person who wrote some notes in your notebook explaining where everything is and how to take care of the animals in the enclosures. Although you were only hired as a night guard, your responsibilities also include taking care of the animals during the night when the zoo staff is not present, ensuring their health and safety to prevent any harm to the animals.
creator: Golovin Alexander
